metadata.name: Add a Driver to an Auto Policy

description: A policyholder wants to add their newly licensed teenage son to their auto insurance policy.

nodes.task_description: Identify the policyholder and retrieve their current policy.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the customer's account.

nodes.task_description: Collect the new driver's information (name, date of birth, driver's license number).

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately captures the new driver's details.

nodes.task_description: Add the new driver to the policy and calculate the change in premium.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully adds the driver and informs the policyholder of the new, higher premium.
